title: 印尼女記者決定告差佬

replies.msg:
Update on Veby Mega Indah

I am authorised to issue the following update.

————-

Two weeks have passed since Ms Veby Mega Indah was seriously injured by a baton round fired by a police officer which was captured on video footage and broadcast around the world. It has been nearly two weeks since a criminal complaint was lodged in relation to the incident.

Regrettably, HK Police have still not confirmed that the perpetrator has been arrested despite ample evidence of how Veby received the injury, in what circumstances and what the perpetrator, a police officer, looks like.

The Commissioner of Police has not even confirmed that the perpetrator has been suspended from duty.

In the face of these failures by the HK police to take appropriate action to investigate this very serious incident and failure by the Commissioner of Police to suspend the officer concerned, we shall be filing applications in the High Court to force the Commissioner to reveal the identity of the perpetrator in order that a private prosecution can be laid against the perpetrator. We shall also be seeking declarations from the court that the failure of the Commissioner to suspend the officer and investigate him, are unlawful.

Veby continues to be cared for by an excellent team of doctors and nurses in hospital. However they are not miracle workers and cannot undo the catestrophic injuries she received to her right eye on September 29 when she was shot in the face by a police baton round.

Yesterday doctors discussed with Veby the option of surgery to alleviate the pressure from liquids that have recently built up within her right eye that have caused her increased pain. Veby has decided to proceed with that surgery. Doctors are also monitoring the condition of her left eye for signs of deterioration of vision.

Veby said

“I am very grateful for the continued care I receive from the medical team at hospital and have been very touched by the prayers and expressions of support that I have received from the people of Hong Kong and Indonesia. Thank you for your blessings”

————

12 October 2019.

https://www.facebook.com/112018101490/posts/10156912155081491?sfns=mo

Google translate一下

Veby Mega Indah女士因警務人員開動的防暴子彈而受重傷，已經過去了兩個星期。自從就此事件提起刑事訴訟以來已經快兩個星期了。

遺憾的是，儘管有充分的證據證明維比如何受到傷害，在何種情況下以及犯罪者（警察）的身分，香港警方仍未確認肇事者已被捕。

警務處處長甚至沒有確認肇事者已被停職。

面對香港警方未能採取適當行動調查這一非常嚴重的事件，以及警務處處長沒有中止有關人員的行為，我們將在高等法院提出申請，迫使處長披露身份以便對肇事者提起公訴。我們還將尋求法院宣告，專員未中止該官員並對其進行調查是非法的。

Veby繼續由一支優秀的醫院醫生和護士團隊進行護理。但是，他們並不是奇蹟般的工人，也無法消除她在9月29日遭到警察警棍擊中面部時右眼遭受的分類傷害。

昨天，醫生與Veby討論了手術的選擇，以減輕最近在她的右眼內部積聚的液體壓力所引起的壓力，這些壓力已導致她的疼痛加劇。 Veby決定繼續進行該手術。醫生還在監視她左眼的狀況，以尋找視力下降的跡象。

維比說

“我非常感謝醫院醫療團隊的持續照顧，並為香港和印度尼西亞人民的祈禱和支持之感動。謝謝你的祝福”

quote.msg:
Update on Veby Mega Indah

I am authorised to issue the following update.

————-

Two weeks have passed since Ms Veby Mega Indah was seriously injured by a baton round fired by a police officer which was captured on video footage and broadcast around the world. It has been nearly two weeks since a criminal complaint was lodged in relation to the incident.

Regrettably, HK Police have still not confirmed that the perpetrator has been arrested despite ample evidence of how Veby received the injury, in what circumstances and what the perpetrator, a police officer, looks like.

The Commissioner of Police has not even confirmed that the perpetrator has been suspended from duty.

In the face of these failures by the HK police to take appropriate action to investigate this very serious incident and failure by the Commissioner of Police to suspend the officer concerned, we shall be filing applications in the High Court to force the Commissioner to reveal the identity of the perpetrator in order that a private prosecution can be laid against the perpetrator. We shall also be seeking declarations from the court that the failure of the Commissioner to suspend the officer and investigate him, are unlawful.

Veby continues to be cared for by an excellent team of doctors and nurses in hospital. However they are not miracle workers and cannot undo the catestrophic injuries she received to her right eye on September 29 when she was shot in the face by a police baton round.

Yesterday doctors discussed with Veby the option of surgery to alleviate the pressure from liquids that have recently built up within her right eye that have caused her increased pain. Veby has decided to proceed with that surgery. Doctors are also monitoring the condition of her left eye for signs of deterioration of vision.

Veby said

“I am very grateful for the continued care I receive from the medical team at hospital and have been very touched by the prayers and expressions of support that I have received from the people of Hong Kong and Indonesia. Thank you for your blessings”

————

12 October 2019.
